commands.review_summary:
The PR branch changes sessions_send async delivery metadata/tests while also changing thousands of unrelated workflow, dependency, app, docs, script, package, and generated files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main creates pending delivery metadata before the void async A2A flow and returns it from normal paths, while tests assert that pending status; no live runtime repro was run in this read-only review.
